name: agent-operations-hero
title: Agent Operations Hero
description: An editable hero block for AI/automation products that shows a real agent workflow with outcome copy + CTAs. Composes Agent Run Timeline (trimmed), Prompt Composer (compact), Tool Call Activity (one active tool), and Source Citation Rail (one result) at reduced complexity across idle/running/tool-active/waiting-for-approval/completed/failed. App-controlled — never simulates a model or shows chain-of-thought. SSR-safe, reduced-motion-safe. Clearly-fictional demo data.
